src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest import with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3/JDK 17.
Replace fastjson JSONUtil usage with internal JsonUtil to remove third-party dependency and align with project standards.
Add log level checks (isInfoEnabled) before constructing log messages to improve performance and reduce unnecessary object creation.
Improve request logging by adding client IP address and formatting output more clearly using StringBuilder.
Use diamond operator for generic type instantiation to modernize Java syntax.
Remove unused import and commented-out code related to java.lang.reflect.Parameter to clean up the source file.
Remove the legacy Spring Security OAuth2 authorization server configuration class which is incompatible with modern Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Deleted the entire AuthorizationServerConfiguration class extending AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace Spring Security OAuth2 ClientDetailsService with custom OauthClientService and ScopeDefinitionService to support dynamic client and scope definitions.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `clientDetailsService.loadClientByClientId` with `oauthClientService.findByClientId` and added loop to fetch `ScopeDefinition` for each scope.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update the model attributes passed to the view to include application name and human-readable scope definitions instead of raw client details.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `model.put("client", client)` to `model.put("applicationName", client.getApplicationName())` and populated scopes with definitions.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Simplify the helper method for extracting the host from a redirect URI by removing complex URI reconstruction and exception handling.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `getHost` method logic with simple string concatenation based on `uri.getScheme()`, `uri.getHost()`, and `uri.getPort()`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Adjust request mapping paths and method signatures to align with the new controller structure and parameter binding.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `@RequestMapping("/oauth/confirm_access")` to `@RequestMapping("/confirm_access")` under class-level `@RequestMapping("/oauth")` and updated method parameters.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.0.0.RELEASE to 3.0.5 to align with Java 17 ecosystem.
Update project properties to target Java 17 instead of Java 8.
Replace deprecated spring-security-oauth2 with the new Spring Authorization Server module required for Spring Boot 3.
Remove explicit spring-boot-starter-logging dependency as it is included by default in Spring Boot 3.
Add Spring Data JPA starter for database interaction.
Add Liquibase core for database schema management.
Update MySQL connector to the new artifact ID compatible with newer Spring Boot versions.
Add explicit Spring Security starter dependency.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype for Java 8+ date/time support.
Add Lombok dependency for boilerplate reduction.
Add MapStruct dependency for object mapping.
Add Caffeine as the caching provider.
Configure Maven compiler plugin for Java 17 and annotation processors (Lombok/MapStruct).
Configure Maven resources plugin to prevent filtering of binary files like fonts and keys.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly define server port and context path properties.
Configure the size of the scheduling task pool.
Configure file-based logging with path and history retention.
Enable and configure Tomcat access logs with rotation.
Update MySQL connection string to include timezone and SSL settings required for newer drivers.
Switch to the new MySQL Connector/J driver class name (com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver) required for MySQL 8+ and newer Spring Boot versions.
Configure HikariCP connection pool max lifetime.
Configure JPA Hibernate settings including DDL auto, ID generator mappings, and dialect.
Enable Liquibase for database schema migration.
Add application-specific configuration for sign-in limits, JWT keys, captcha, OAuth2 issuer, and third-party integrations.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Upgrade Bootstrap Grid CSS from version 4.0.0 to 5.2.3 to adopt modern CSS variables and remove IE11-specific prefixes.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced entire bootstrap-grid.css content with v5.2.3 distribution, switching from hardcoded values to CSS custom properties (--bs-*) and removing @-ms-viewport.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Replace Bootstrap 4.0.0 CSS with Bootstrap 5.2.3 to adopt modern CSS variables and updated reset styles.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced content of bootstrap-reboot.css from v4.0.0 to v5.2.3, introducing :root variables and removing IE11-specific hacks.
